message:
Add .target-* to .gitignore for per-agent cargo build directories

Concurrent agents (e.g., bedrock, topaz) use isolated .target-<name>/
directories to avoid cargo lock contention. These are ephemeral build
artifacts that should never be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,9 @@ tests/ext_conformance/reports/*
 .tmp-*
 .white_deer_target/
 
+# Per-agent cargo target directories
+.target-*/
+
 # Patch/merge artifacts
 *.orig
 *.rej
